diagrams.title: Five V's of Big Data
diagrams.description: A circular diagram showing the five fundamental characteristics of Big Data
elements: Volume at top (data scale: TB to ZB)
Velocity on right (speed: batch to real-time)
Variety at bottom left (data types: structured, semi-structured, unstructured)
Veracity at bottom right (quality: accurate to noisy)
Value in center (goal: insights and decisions)
All five V's interconnected showing they work together
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the five core characteristics that define Big Data and their interrelationships

diagrams.title: Big Data Characteristics vs Traditional Systems
diagrams.description: Comparison chart showing how Big Data characteristics differ from traditional data management
elements: Velocity: Traditional (batch) vs Big Data (real-time streaming)
Variety: Traditional (structured only) vs Big Data (all types)
Veracity: Traditional (high quality) vs Big Data (variable quality)
Value: Traditional (known insights) vs Big Data (unknown patterns)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the scale and scope differences between traditional and Big Data approaches
